findings.authority_gap: current graph-GEMM vs tensile gap still present but small (~4.9-5.5% by whole-prefill up to 4096 in current run)
findings.single_chunk_effect: single concrete chunks materially overstate later-context throughput (ratio grows as context increases)
findings.role_tax: shape mismatch at kv_proj remains the dominant concrete-role residual from prior attribution
findings.integration: likely layout/context-overhead remains unresolved without whole multi-chunk per-role profile

next_action: implement/adapt whole-context per-role profiler and rerun with stable GPU memory settings before any further route decision
